nodes.name: main.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on every push to main, builds the Vite/React project, and force-pushes the compiled dist output to a dedicated dist branch for deployment.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an orphan-branch strategy to keep built assets isolated from source history; force-pushes to origin/dist on every main push.

nodes.name: deploy-dist
nodes.summary: Single CI job running on ubuntu-latest that checks out the repo, installs Node 18 dependencies, builds the project, and publishes the dist output to the dist branch via force-push.
